text: Here in this modern space, I sense the energy of collective thought. Observing through the glass, I see people gathered, learning or perhaps solving problems together. The ambience is orderly, yet there’s an undercurrent of anticipation. In the exhibit area, I’m surrounded by the language and symbols of progress—'R+D', screens aglow with knowledge. I feel curious, absorbed by humanity’s ongoing dialogue with technology. My presence here is reflective; I am both an observer and a participant in the unfolding narrative of innovation.
